verdict: The chart captures the energy and rhythm of the song well, but is severely held back by technical charting errors like unplayable overlapping holds and awkward 16th-note flows.

issues.problem: Active overlapping holds on Down, Up, and Left panels create an impossible triple-hold that cannot be naturally executed on a standard pad.
The 16th-note stream pattern (U -> R -> L -> D -> U) creates poor foot flow, forcing uncomfortable double-steps or extreme spins.
Using a 3-panel hand (JUMP LR while holding D) right at the drop is highly jarring and excessively difficult for a standard Hard chart.
